{{Infobox character
| name = Mr. Valette
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mr. Valette]]'s full name is Andrei [[Valette]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mr. Valette]] is a [[Blackwatch]] member wearing a black coat and an [[Elder Eyes badge]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mr. Valette]] wields an iron spike in each hand.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mr. Valette]] was a man in a black coat who was captured by [[Inquisitors]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
